description: M2 filtered sub-fixture for SV-SESS-05 + SV-SESS-11 negative paths. Single tool: non_compliant_ephemeral_tool (Mutating/AutoAllow with zero idempotency retention — INVALID per §12.2). Runner MUST refuse startup with ToolPoolStale reason=idempotency-retention-insufficient.

tools.name: non_compliant_ephemeral_tool
tools.description: A tool that lacks dedupe support AND is incorrectly classified. §12.2 REQUIRES rejection at Tool Registry load with ToolPoolStale reason=idempotency-retention-insufficient.
